title: analytics — feature keys
description: Per-provider availability + advanced feature keys. Resolved at /auth/me. Downstream: `analytics.enabled` gates the module surface; per-provider keys let tenants pick their fan-out set.

features.description: Master enable for backend-driven analytics capture. Off = analytics module never captures.
Enables PostHog as a selectable analytics provider. Baseline plan.
Enables GA4 measurement protocol. Baseline plan. Distinct config from marketing::ga4 allowed.
Enables Mixpanel /import endpoint. Requires analytics_advanced_providers entitlement.
Enables Segment as an upstream fan-out point (Segment then routes to N downstream destinations). Requires analytics_advanced_providers entitlement.
Enables June (B2B analytics). Requires analytics_advanced_providers entitlement.
Enables the HMAC-signed custom webhook driver. Requires analytics_advanced_providers entitlement + a validated tenant.allowed_egress_domains entry.
Enables session-recording capture via the PostHog provider. Requires analytics_session_recording entitlement + subject-level `functional` consent.
